name: Sinful Spoils of Subversion - Snake-Eye
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>反</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>逆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－スネークアイ
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. You can only activate 1 "Sinful Spoils of Subversion - Snake-Eye" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. You can only activate 1 "Sinful Spoils of Subversion - Snake-Eye" per turn.

action: Places cards from field in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from the opponent's field in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
